title: Selected Producer Price Indexes
description: Monthly percent changes calculated from selected BLS PPI index levels.

pce_impact_method.formula: sum(PPI monthly percent change x PCE weight / 100)
pce_impact_method.coverage: Selected components represent 21.195 percent of the supplied PCE weights.
pce_impact_method.caveat: This is a mechanical proxy based on selected PPI components, not an official BEA Core PCE estimate.
